---
title: "ordenaR"
author: "Edson Silva-Júnior"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Ordening species abundance by gradients by {[ordenaR](https://github.com/Edbbioeco/ordenaR)}

<img src="ordenaR.png" width="350">

# Download package

```{r}
library(remotes)

remotes::install_github("Edbbioeco/ordenaR")
```

or simply:

```{r}
install.packages("ordenaR")
```

# Package funcionality
